mapper.insert: INSERT INTO faq_file (fileno, faqno, filename, savedname, filesize, rdate) VALUES (faq_file_seq.NEXTVAL, #{faqno}, #{filename}, #{savedname}, #{filesize}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT fileno, faqno, filename, savedname, filesize, rdate FROM faq_file WHERE faqno = #{faqno} ORDER BY fileno
